query:
SELECT af.id, af.feedbackType, SUBSTRING(af.explanation, 1, 150) as explanation_start, af.createdAt, u.name as userName
FROM ai_feedback af
LEFT JOIN users u ON af.userId = u.id
WHERE af.status = 'pending'
ORDER BY af.createdAt DESC;

FROM ai_feedback af
LEFT JOIN users u ON af.userId = u.id

ORDER BY af.createdAt DESC;
